2605.04831.title: StoryAlign: Evaluating and Training Reward Models for Story Generation
2605.04831.paper_summary: Story generation aims to automatically produce coherent, structured, and engaging narratives. Although large language models (LLMs) have significantly advanced text generation, stories generated by LLMs still diverge from human-authored works regarding complex narrative structure and human-aligned preferences. A key reason is the absence of effective modeling of human story preferences, which are inherently subjective and under-explored. In this work, we systematically evaluate the modeling of human story preferences and introduce StoryRMB, the first benchmark for assessing reward models on story preferences. StoryRMB contains $1,133$ high-quality, human-verified instances, each consisting of a prompt, one chosen story, and three rejected stories. We find existing reward models struggle to select human-preferred stories, with the best model achieving only $66.3\%$ accuracy. To address this limitation, we construct roughly $100,000$ high-quality story preference pairs across diverse domains and develop StoryReward, an advanced reward model for story preference trained on this dataset. StoryReward achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance on StoryRMB, outperforming much larger models. We also adopt StoryReward in downstream test-time scaling applications for best-of-n (BoN) story selection and find that it generally chooses stories better aligned with human preferences. We will release our dataset, model, and code to facilitate future research. Related code and data are available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/StoryReward.
2605.04831.paper_summary_zh: 故事生成旨在自動產生連貫、結構化且引人入勝的敘事。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）在文本生成方面取得了顯著進展，但LLMs生成的故事在複雜的敘事結構和人類對偏好的對齊方面仍與人類創作的作品有所偏離。這一主要原因是缺乏對人類故事偏好的有效建模，而這些偏好本質上是主觀的且未被充分探索。在這項工作中，我們系統性地評估人類故事偏好的建模，並介紹StoryRMB，這是評估故事偏好的獎勵模型的第一個基準。StoryRMB包含$1,133$個高質量的人類驗證實例，每個實例由一個提示、一個選擇的故事和三個被拒絕的故事組成。我們發現現有的獎勵模型在選擇人類偏好的故事時表現不佳，最佳模型的準確率僅為$66.3\%$。為了解決這一限制，我們在不同領域構建了約$100,000$對高質量的故事偏好對，並開發了StoryReward，這是一個基於該數據集訓練的先進故事偏好獎勵模型。StoryReward在StoryRMB上達到了最先進的（SoTA）性能，超越了更大規模的模型。我們還在下游測試時間擴展應用中採用了StoryReward，以進行最佳故事選擇（BoN），並發現它通常選擇與人類偏好更一致的故事。我們將發布我們的數據集、模型和代碼，以促進未來的研究。相關的代碼和數據可在https://github.com/THU-KEG/StoryReward獲得。
2605.04831.author: Haotian Xia et.al.
2605.04831.authors: Haotian Xia, Hao Peng, Yunjia Qi, Xiaozhi Wang, Bin Xu, Lei Hou, Juanzi Li
